title: Bat Removal & Exclusion Services in North Castle, NY
metaDescription: Professional bat removal and exclusion in North Castle, Westchester. Humane, effective bat control for homes and businesses. Licensed experts. Call today!
intro: North Castle residents dealing with bat infestations need swift, humane solutions to protect their homes and families. Our certified bat removal specialists provide comprehensive exclusion services throughout North Castle, from the historic estates near Armonk to properties surrounding Windmill Farm & Craft Market. We safely remove bats and seal entry points to prevent future intrusions.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over a decade of wildlife management experience to North Castle, combining state-of-the-art exclusion techniques with deep knowledge of local bat species and behavior. Our licensed technicians understand Westchester's unique architecture and provide guaranteed solutions that comply with all New York wildlife protection regulations.
localContext: North Castle's wooded neighborhoods, historic homes, and properties near the Ward Pound Ridge Reservation create ideal habitats for bat colonies seeking attic and chimney access. The town's mix of century-old estates and newer constructions requires customized exclusion strategies that preserve architectural integrity while ensuring complete bat removal.

faqs.question: What does bat exclusion involve in North Castle homes?
faqs.answer: Bat exclusion involves a comprehensive inspection to locate all entry points, installation of one-way exclusion devices that allow bats to exit but not return, sealing all potential access points with durable materials, and sanitizing affected areas. The process typically takes 2-4 weeks to ensure all bats have safely departed before final sealing.

faqs.question: Why does bat removal cost $900–$2,500 in North Castle?
faqs.answer: Pricing depends on colony size, number of entry points, accessibility of roosting areas, extent of exclusion work needed, and sanitation requirements. Larger North Castle homes with multiple access points or established colonies in difficult-to-reach attics may require more extensive work, while smaller infestations with limited entry points fall at the lower end of the range.

faqs.question: When is bat season in North Castle, and when should exclusion be done?
faqs.answer: Bat maternity season runs from May through August, when exclusion work cannot be performed to avoid trapping flightless pups inside. The ideal times for bat removal in North Castle are spring (March-April) or fall (September-October). However, inspections and preparation work can be scheduled year-round.

faqs.question: Are bats in North Castle dangerous to my family?
faqs.answer: While bats are beneficial for controlling insects, they can carry rabies and their droppings (guano) may harbor histoplasmosis spores that pose respiratory risks. Bats should never be handled directly. Professional removal ensures your family's safety while humanely relocating the bats and thoroughly sanitizing contaminated areas to eliminate health hazards.
